name: dragos-sitestore
label: Dragos SiteStore
description: Dragos SiteStore is a key component of the Dragos Platform, designed to enhance cybersecurity for industrial control systems (ICS) and operational technology (OT) environments. It serves as the management and reporting console for data collected by Dragos sensors, providing comprehensive visibility and threat detection capabilities.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.description: Specify the URL of the Dragos SiteStore server to connect and perform automated operations.
fields.name: server_url
fields.tooltip: Specify the URL of the Dragos SiteStore server to connect and perform automated operations.

fields.title: API ID
fields.description: Specify the API ID to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations
fields.name: api_id
fields.tooltip: Specify the API ID to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations

fields.title: API Secret
fields.description: Specify the API Secret to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations
fields.name: api_secret
fields.tooltip: Specify the API Secret to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.

operations.title: Get All Assets
operations.description: Retrieves all assets from Dragos SiteStore based on created time, last seen time, and other filter parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Created After
parameters.description: (Optional) Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: createdAtAfter
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created after the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: Created Before
parameters.description: (Optional) Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created before the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: createdAtBefore
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were created before the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: LastSeen After
parameters.description: (Optional) Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were last seen after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: lastSeenAtAfter
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were last seen after the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: LastSeen Before
parameters.description: (Optional) Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were last seen before the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: lastSeenAtBefore
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select a date and time to retrieve results that include only those items that were last seen before the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: Include Deleted Assets
parameters.description: (Optional) Select to include deleted assets in the results retrieved from Dragos SiteStore.
parameters.name: is_deleted
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select to include deleted assets in the results retrieved from Dragos SiteStore.

parameters.title: Overlaps Address Start DateTime
parameters.description: (Optional) Select the start date and time of the timeframe to retrieve only those assets that were active or relevant during the specified time frame.
parameters.name: overlaps_starttime
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select the start date and time of the timeframe to retrieve only those assets that were active or relevant during the specified time frame.

parameters.title: Overlaps Address End DateTime
parameters.description: (Optional) Select the end date and time of the timeframe to retrieve only those assets that were active or relevant during the specified time frame.
parameters.name: overlaps_endtime
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select the end date and time of the timeframe to retrieve only those assets that were active or relevant during the specified time frame.

parameters.title: Mask Address Start DateTime
parameters.description: (Optional) Select the start date and time of the timeframe to retrieve masked assets that were active or relevant during the specified time frame.
parameters.name: maskAddress_starttime
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select the start date and time of the timeframe to retrieve masked assets that were active or relevant during the specified time frame.

parameters.title: Mask Address End DateTime
parameters.description: (Optional) Select the end date and time of the timeframe to retrieve masked assets that were active or relevant during the specified time frame.
parameters.name: maskAddress_endtime
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select the end date and time of the timeframe to retrieve masked assets that were active or relevant during the specified time frame.

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.description: (Optional) Select the fields by which to sort the assets retrieved. You can choose one or more from the following options: ID, Created At, LastSeen At, First Address ID, First Address Type, First Address Network ID, First Address Value, or Attribute.
parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select the fields by which to sort the assets retrieved. You can choose one or more from the following options: ID, Created At, LastSeen At, First Address ID, First Address Type, First Address Network ID, First Address Value, or Attribute.

parameters.title: Order By
parameters.description: (Optional) Select to retrieve the assets in descending order. Clear the checkbox, i.e., leave unchecked to retrieve results in ascending order.
parameters.name: order_by
parameters.tooltip: Select a checkbox to order the retrieved assets. If selected, they will be retrieved in descending order. Note: This parameter is used in combination with the "Sort By" parameter.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response.
parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response.

parameters.title: Page Number
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the page number from which to retrieve results when pagination is applied. This parameter is used to fetch a specific subset of results based on the page number, helping to break large datasets into manageable chunks.
parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the page number from which to retrieve results when pagination is applied. This parameter is used to fetch a specific subset of results based on the page number, helping to break large datasets into manageable chunks.

parameters.title: Limit Total Count
parameters.description: (Optional) Specifies the maximum number of results to be returned in the response. This parameter helps control the volume of data by limiting the total count of items in the response.
parameters.name: limitTotalCount
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specifies the maximum number of results to be returned in the response. This parameter helps control the volume of data by limiting the total count of items in the response.

parameters.title: Additional Parameters
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify additional parameters with which to filter assets in Dragos SiteStore.
parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify additional parameters with which to filter assets in Dragos SiteStore.

operations.title: Get All Notifications
operations.description: Retrieves all notifications from Dragos SiteStore based on the filter query, created time, and other filter parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Filter
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify a filter string in Feed Item Query Language (FIQL) format to retrieve notifications. Syntax: fieldname operator value
parameters.name: filter
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify a filter string in Feed Item Query Language (FIQL) format to retrieve notifications. Syntax: fieldname operator value

parameters.title: Created After
parameters.description: (Optional) Select the date and time to retrieve results containing items created after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: createdAtAfter
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select the date and time to retrieve results containing items created after the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: State
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the state based on which to retrieve notifications from Dragos SiteStore. You can choose from the following options: RESOLVED or UNRESOLVED
parameters.name: state
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the state based on which to retrieve notifications from Dragos SiteStore. You can choose from the following options: RESOLVED or UNRESOLVED

parameters.title: Sorts
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify comma-separated field names, colon, and a (for ascending) or d (for descending). You can any of these field names: id, source, type, createdAt, occurredAt, severity, reviewed, retained, detectorId, firstSourceIp, firstDestinationIp, firstOtherIp, lastSeenAt. For example: source:a, retained:d
parameters.name: sorts
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify comma-separated field names, colon, and a (for ascending) or d (for descending). You can any of these field names: id, source, type, createdAt, occurredAt, severity, reviewed, retained, detectorId, firstSourceIp, firstDestinationIp, firstOtherIp, lastSeenAt. For example: source:a, retained:d

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.description: (Optional) Select the fields by which to sort the assets retrieved. You can choose one or more from the following options: ID, Source, Type, Created At, Occurred At, Severity, Reviewed, etc.
parameters.name: sortField
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select the fields by which to sort the assets retrieved. You can choose one or more from the following options: ID, Source, Type, Created At, Occurred At, Severity, Reviewed, etc.

parameters.title: Order By
parameters.description: (Optional) Select to retrieve the records in descending order. Clear the checkbox, i.e., leave unchecked, to retrieve the records in ascending order.
parameters.name: sortDescending
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select to retrieve the records in descending order. Clear the checkbox, i.e., leave unchecked, to retrieve the records in ascending order. Note: This parameter is used in combination with the "Sort By" parameter.

parameters.title: Resolve Children Depth
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the number of steps deep to recursively resolve child notifications
parameters.name: resolveChildrenDepth
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the number of steps deep to recursively resolve child notifications

parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the number of records to skip when retrieving records from Dragos SiteStore server.
parameters.name: offset
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the number of records to skip when retrieving records from Dragos SiteStore server.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response.
parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response. By default, it will be fetch 10 records and maximum 1000 records.

parameters.title: Page Number
parameters.description:
(Optional) Specify the page number from which to retrieve results when
pagination is applied. This parameter is used to fetch a specific subset of results based on the page number, helping to break large datasets into manageable chunks.
parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.tooltip: Specifies the page of results to retrieve when pagination is applied. This parameter is used to fetch a specific subset of results based on the page number, helping to break large datasets into manageable chunks.

parameters.title: Limit Total Count
parameters.description: (Optional) Specifies the maximum number of results to be returned in the response. This parameter helps control the volume of data by limiting the total count of items in the response.
parameters.name: limitTotalCount
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specifies the maximum number of results to be returned in the response. This parameter helps control the volume of data by limiting the total count of items in the response.

parameters.title: Additional Parameters
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify additional parameters with which to filter records in Dragos SiteStore.
parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify additional parameters with which to filter records in Dragos SiteStore.

operations.title: Get Notifications Details
operations.description: Retrieves details for one or more notifications from Dragos SiteStore based on the notification ID, notification depth, and other filter parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Notification IDs
parameters.description: Specify the comma-separated notification IDs to retrieve their details from Dragos SiteStore.
parameters.name: ids
parameters.tooltip: Specify the comma-separated notification IDs to retrieve their details from Dragos SiteStore.

parameters.title: Resolve Children Depth
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify the number of steps deep to recursively resolve child notifications
parameters.name: resolveChildrenDepth
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify the number of steps deep to recursively resolve child notifications

parameters.title: Include Conversations
parameters.description: (Optional) Select to include conversations along with the notifications. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to True.
parameters.name: includeConversations
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Select to include conversations along with the notifications. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to True.

operations.title: Get Statistics of Notification
operations.description: Retrieves a specific notification statistics from Dragos SiteStore based on the group by and the filter query that you have specified.

parameters.title: Group By
parameters.description: Select an multiple options based on which you want to filter response. You can choose from the following options: Type, Source, Severity, Asset ID, Reviewed, etc.
parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.tooltip: Select an multiple options based on which you want to filter response. You can choose from the following options: Type, Source, Severity, Asset ID, Reviewed, etc.

parameters.title: Filter
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify a filter string in Feed Item Query Language (FIQL) format to retrieve notification statistics. Syntax: fieldname operator value
parameters.name: filter
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify a filter string in Feed Item Query Language (FIQL) format to retrieve notification statistics. Syntax: fieldname operator value

operations.title: Get All Detections
operations.description: Retrieves all detections from Dragos SiteStore based on the excluded or included fields, sorting criteria and direction, and other pagination parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Include Fields
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify a comma-separated list of fields to include along with other required fields in the response.
parameters.name: includeFields
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify a comma-separated list of fields to include along with other required fields in the response.

parameters.title: Exclude Fields
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify a comma-separated list of fields to exclude from the detections returned. NOTE: Required fields are always returned, even when excluded.
parameters.name: excludeFields
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify a comma-separated list of fields to exclude from the detections returned. NOTE: Required fields are always returned, even when excluded.

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify fields, as comma-separated values, by which to filter the response.

operations.title: Execute an API Request
operations.description: Sends an API request to an API endpoint based on specified HTTP method, endpoint, and other input parameters that you have specified, enabling flexible API interactions tailored to user needs.

parameters.name: method
parameters.title: HTTP Method
parameters.description:
Select an HTTP action for the request. You can select from the following options:  

DELETE 

GET 

PATCH 

POST 

PUT

parameters.title: Endpoint
parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.tooltip: Specify the target API URL path for example: assets/api/v4/getAssets
parameters.description: Specify the target API URL path for the request. For example, if the website is https://example.com and URL path is https://example.com/images/pic.jpg, the endpoint would be images/pic.jpg.

parameters.title: Query Parameters
parameters.name: query_params
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify any optional parameters to add to the URL and refine the request.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.title: Request Payload
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify data, as JSON, to be sent as the request payload (typically for POST or PUT requests).
